divergences.claim: defaultPageSize() returns 50. List views paginate in fixed pages of 50 items unless an explicit size is passed, so a result set of N items spans ceil(N / 50) pages and page links run from 1 to ceil(N / 50).
divergences.prose: defaultPageSize() returns 50. List views paginate in fixed pages of 50 items unless an explicit size is passed, so a result set of N items spans ceil(N / 50) pages and page links run from 1 to ceil(N / 50).
